owner.dashboardSubtitle: Manage your businesses and view performance
owner.analyticsNotAvailable: Analytics data is not yet available for this business.
owner.noBusinessesDescription: You don't have any claimed businesses yet. Start by claiming a business you own.

analytics.title: Business Analytics
analytics.noDataDescription: Analytics data will appear here once your business starts receiving traffic.
analytics.noTimeseriesData: No trend data available for this period

promotions.title: Promotions & Deals
promotions.description: Create special offers to attract customers

claim.title: Claim This Business
claim.selectMethodDescription: Select how you'd like to verify your ownership of this business.
claim.businessNotFoundDescription: We couldn't find the business you're looking for.
claim.alreadyClaimedDescription: This business has already been claimed by its owner. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
claim.googleNotAvailable: Google Business verification is not yet available. Please choose another method.

phone.title: Phone Verification
phone.description: Receive a PIN via SMS to the business phone number

email.title: Email Verification
email.description: Receive a verification link at the business email address

document.title: Document Verification
document.description: Upload business registration documents for manual review

google.title: Google Business
google.description: Verify using your Google Business Profile (coming soon)

phone.enterNumberDescription: Enter the phone number associated with this business. We'll send a 6-digit PIN.
phone.label: Business Phone Number

email.enterEmailDescription: Enter an email address at the business domain. We'll send a verification link.
email.label: Business Email Address
email.hint: Should match the business website domain for faster verification
email.sentDescription: A verification link has been sent. Click it to complete verification.

document.uploadDescription: Upload documents that prove your ownership of this business.
document.filesHint: Upload up to 3 documents (PDF, JPG, PNG)

pending.title: Verification Pending
pending.description: Your claim is being reviewed. We'll notify you once a decision is made.

success.title: Claim Approved!
success.description: Congratulations! You are now the verified owner of {{businessName}}.

rejected.title: Claim Rejected
rejected.description: Your claim was not approved. You may submit an appeal if you believe this was an error.
rejected.appealPlaceholder: Explain why you believe this decision should be reconsidered...
